title: GCP DevOps
description:
What impact will you make?

Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. As the undisputed leader in professional services, Deloitte is where you will find unrivaled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential

Deloitte is where you will find unrivaled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.







The Team

Deloitte’s Technology & Transformation Technology & Transformation (T&T) - Engineering, AI & Data (EAID) - Intelligent Apps Team focuses on developing, implementing, and managing advanced software solutions that leverage Artificial Intelligence, Generative AI, and data analytics to transform business operations. This team is part of Deloitte Consulting’s Engineering practice, which combines a product-centric mindset with industry-specific insights.







Work you’ll do

Job Title: Senior DevOps Engineer with GCP Cloud Expertise

Experience Level: Senior (6-10 years)

Role Summary

As a Senior DevOps Engineer at Deloitte India, you will play a pivotal role in architecting, implementing, and optimizing our cloud infrastructure and DevOps practices. Your extensive experience in GCP and DevOps methodologies will be instrumental in ensuring the reliability, scalability, and security of our systems.

Key Responsibilities

1. Lead the design, deployment, and management of cloud infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).

2. Architect and implement highly scalable and available systems that meet business and technical requirements.

3. Develop and maintain infrastructure as code (IaC) using industry-standard tools such as Terraform.

4. Design and implement robust and automated CI/CD pipelines to facilitate rapid software deployment.

5. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand project requirements and provide DevOps solutions.

6. Monitor and optimize cloud-based systems for performance, scalability, and cost efficiency.

7. Implement and enforce security best practices and compliance standards for cloud-based applications.

8. Troubleshoot complex issues and provide root cause analysis and resolution.

9. Mentor and guide junior team members, sharing your expertise and best practices.

10. Stay current with emerging technologies and industry trends related to DevOps and cloud computing.

11. Participate in on-call support and incident resolution as needed.







Must-have Skills:

1. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

2. 6-10 years of hands-on experience in DevOps, cloud engineering, or related roles.

3. Strong expertise in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) services and products.

4. Proficiency in one or more programming or scripting languages (e.g., Python, Bash, Ruby).

5. Extensive experience with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.

6. Expertise in infrastructure as code (IaC) tools like Terraform.

7. Proven experience with CI/CD pipelines and related tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD).

8. Solid understanding of networking, security, and cloud architecture best practices.

9. Exceptional problem-solving skills and the ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment.

10. Excellent communication skills and the ability to document processes and procedures.




Preferred Skills:




1. Google Cloud Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer certification or equivalent.

2. Experience with other cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure.

3. Extensive experience with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.

4. Familiarity with automation and configuration management tools (e.g., Ansible, Puppet, Chef).

5. Proficiency in monitoring and logging tools (e.g., Prometheus, ELK stack, Grafana).

6. Prior experience in a leadership or senior role within a DevOps team.

7. Strong project management skills and the ability to drive initiatives to completion.




Your role as a leader

At Deloitte India, we believe in the importance of leadership at all levels. We expect our people to embrace and live our purpose by challenging themselves to identify issues that are most important for our clients, our people, and for society and make an impact that matters.

In addition to living our purpose, Manager/ Sr.Consultant/Consultant across our organization:

1. Develop high-performing people and teams through challenging and meaningful opportunities

2. Deliver exceptional client service; maximize results and drive high performance from people while fostering collaboration across businesses and borders

3. Influence clients, teams, and individuals positively, leading by example and establishing confident relationships with increasingly senior people

4. Understand key objectives for clients and Deloitte; align people to objectives and set priorities and direction.

5. Acts as a role model, embracing and living our purpose and values, and recognizing others for the impact they make




How you will grow

At Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there is always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help build excellent skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world. From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career. Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Centre.




Benefits

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.




Our purpose

Deloitte is led by a purpose: To make an impact that matters.

Every day, Deloitte people are making a real impact in the places they live and work. We pride ourselves on doing not only what is good for clients, but also what is good for our people and the

Communities in which we live and work—always striving to be an organization that is held up as a role model of quality, integrity, and positive change. Learn more about Deloitte's impact on the world




Recruiter tips

We want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you are applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: Application Engineer Tier 1
description:
About ValGenesis
ValGenesis is a leading digital validation platform provider for life sciences companies. ValGenesis suite of products are used by 30 of the top 50 global pharmaceutical and biotech companies to achieve digital transformation, total compliance and manufacturing excellence/intelligence across their product lifecycle.

Learn more about working for ValGenesis, the de facto standard for paperless validation in Life Sciences: https://www.valgenesis.com/about

About the Role:

Responsibilities:


Knowledge & Application:
Apply advanced troubleshooting methodologies, using structured problem-solving techniques to resolve technical issues.
Analyze and resolve a variety of software-related issues, ensuring solutions align with customer needs and compliance requirements.
Provide direct technical support to customers, guiding them through system workflows, configurations, and best practices.
Contribute to knowledge base articles, FAQs, and process documentation, ensuring troubleshooting information remains up to date.
Complexity & Problem-Solving:
Work on problems of moderate scope, where data evaluation and troubleshooting require deeper analysis than entry-level roles.
Diagnose and resolve recurring technical issues, identifying patterns and recommending process improvements.
Improve internal troubleshooting workflows, documenting new technical solutions for cross-team learning and efficiency.
Ensure compliance with Service Level Agreements (SLAs), prioritizing support tasks based on urgency and impact.
Collaboration & Interaction:
Build productive relationships with cross-functional teams, including Product, Engineering, and Customer Success.
Provide mentorship to entry-level engineers, guiding them through troubleshooting techniques and system analysis.
Work closely with customers and end-users, ensuring technical solutions are well understood and properly implemented.
Participate in daily or weekly technical review meetings with direct Lead, discussing challenging cases, resolution strategies, and process enhancements.
Contribute to internal training sessions, sharing expertise on troubleshooting methodologies and create CTS internal training materials.
Communicate effectively with non-technical users, simplifying complex issues into actionable guidance.
Other Activities
Tier I application engineer is responsible update IMS fields in regard to PSR/PSTR, HFSR Document ID.
Tier I application engineer is responsible to executing the test scripts to verify the Issue/defects.
Responsible to reproduce bug/defects in testing environment before bug fixing
May execute Retest bug/defects in testing environment after bug fixing, and before deploying.
Defect tracking in IMS system




Requirements:


Typically requires 2-4 years of experience in technical support, application engineering, or software troubleshooting.
Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, IT, or a related discipline (or equivalent work experience).
Background in the Life Sciences Industry (e.g., Pharma, Biotech, Validation, Cleaning Validation, Risk Management, or Manufacturing) is highly valued.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts in a clear and concise manner.
Strong problem-solving skills with keen attention to detail.
Ability to work effectively in a team-oriented environment, collaborating across departments to resolve customer issues.
Commitment to providing exceptional customer service, ensuring efficient issue resolution and customer satisfaction.
Communicate in a professional manner (both within and outside immediate team), showcasing customer service skills, common courtesy and tact.
Strong time management and organizational skills.
Proficiency in Microsoft Word and Excel.
Strong documentation skills, with the ability to write structured troubleshooting steps for knowledge-sharing.




We’re on a Mission
In 2005, we disrupted the life sciences industry by introducing the world’s first digital validation lifecycle management system. ValGenesis VLMS® revolutionized compliance-based corporate validation activities and has remained the industry standard.

Today, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation ― enhancing and expanding our portfolio beyond validation with an end-to-end digital transformation platform. We combine our purpose-built systems with world-class consulting services to help every facet of GxP meet evolving regulations and quality expectations.

The Team You’ll Join
Our customers’ success is our success. We keep the customer experience centered in our decisions, from product to marketing to sales to services to support. Life sciences companies exist to improve humanity’s quality of life, and we honor that mission.

We work together. We communicate openly, support each other without reservation, and never hesitate to wear multiple hats to get the job done.

We think big. Innovation is the heart of ValGenesis. That spirit drives product development as well as personal growth. We never stop aiming upward.

We’re in it to win it. We’re on a path to becoming the number one intelligent validation platform in the market, and we won’t settle for anything less than being a market leader.

How We Work
Our Chennai, Hyderabad and Bangalore offices are onsite, 5 days per week. We believe that in-person interaction and collaboration fosters creativity, and a sense of community, and is critical to our future success as a company.

ValGenesis is an equal-opportunity employer that makes employment decisions on the basis of merit. Our goal is to have the best-qualified people in every job. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristics protected by local law.
